title: Pre-Beta 1.8 Enderman
description: The White Eyed Enderman seen in Development Photos Notch Posted
body:
This Resourcepack is a Recreation of the Enderman seen in Development Photos Notch Posted

i had Recently discovered it did not use the modern Enderman Texture from Brightening one of its Photos on the Minecraft Wiki, and since i have not seen anyone recreate it, i decided to do it myself

it is a bit different from Modern as it uses Steve Like The Zombie and Skeleton

![The Enderman](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/D3QvesQB/images/93e986a0a1a72e509b5ec947f02ad564f7cd73fc.png)
